name: CHRONIC GLOMERULONEPHRITIS
discriminating_features: small smooth kidneys with wasted parenchyma
patchy nephrogram with diminished density of contrast medium

general: small smooth kidneys with wasted parenchyma
patchy nephrogram with diminished density of contrast medium
US: small kidneys with vicarious sinus lipomatosis
ANGIO: marked reduction in renal blood flow
reflux of contrast material into aorta
severely pruned + tortuous interlobar and arcuate arteries
delayed contrast clearance from interlobar arteries
